sentence: 外面下着小雨，记得带伞。
pinyin: Wàimiàn xià zhe xiǎoyǔ, jìde dài sǎn.
english: It's drizzling outside; remember to bring an umbrella.

sentence: 旧时官府常常拉夫充当劳役。
pinyin: Jiùshí guānfǔ chángcháng lāfū chōngdāng láoyì.
english: In the old days, authorities would often press-gang men into forced labor.

pinyin: Zhè tiáo lù shì dānxiàng tōngxíng de.
english: This road is one-way traffic only.

sentence: 我家的网络带宽不够用。
pinyin: Wǒ jiā de wǎngluò dàikuān bú gòu yòng.
english: The internet bandwidth at my home is not enough.

sentence: 夏天没有风扇真的很难熬。
pinyin: Xiàtiān méiyǒu fēngshàn zhēn de hěn nán áo.
english: Summer without an electric fan is really unbearable.
